title: PUBLIC BENEFITS HOTLINE - 211info
text: LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE PUBLIC BENEFITS HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advice and representation to individuals facing issues with government benefits and public charge questions, including Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) service denials or other CCO-related problems, medical billing and debt collection issues, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), refugee benefits, SNAP (food stamps), overpayments, in-home services, unemployment compensation, Employment Related Day Care (ERDC), and Temporary Assistance for Domestic Violence Survivors (TADVS). Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday/Thursday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 9:30am-12:30pm (800) 520-5292 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 520-5292 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon (excluding Jackson County) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Immigration Issues Benefits and Services Assistance * Public Assistance Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - GENERAL LEGAL AID LEGAL SERVICES - OREGON RENTER'S RIGHTS RESOURCES LEGAL SERVICES - SENIOR LAW PROJECT TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - LOW INCOME TAXPAYER CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
